title: SEEG Resting State Recording
description: This dataset comprises stereoelectroencephalography (SEEG) resting state recordings from two patients with epilepsy. The recordings were obtained using Sinovation SDE-08 medical-grade depth electrodes with standardized specifications. This resource provides raw neurophysiological data suitable for investigating intracranial brain activity patterns and epileptogenic networks.
methods_description: Resting state SEEG recordings were acquired using Sinovation SDE-08 medical-grade stainless steel depth electrodes (0.8 mm diameter, 2 mm contact length, 3.5 mm inter-contact spacing, 8-16 contacts per electrode).
